message:
refactor(pager): extract WalPageOneWritePlan for semantic classification

Replace the monolithic wal_commit_requires_page_one boolean with a
structured WalPageOneWritePlan that classifies each trigger (page-1
dirty, freelist metadata dirty, database growth) independently. This
lets future beads remove or defer each page-1 write class without
re-analyzing the combined predicate.

Add init_publication_test_tracing helper for structured test output.
Add test_wal_page_one_write_plan_for_interior_update_has_no_trigger
verifying that an interior page update produces a plan with no page-1
write triggers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
